name: Yuletide Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: Ghiradelli Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips (1 package, 6 ozs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter with brown sugar, brandy flavoring, and corn syrup until well combined.
3. Add egg and beat the mixture until very light and smooth.
4. Mix in diced candied fruit with 1 tablespoon of flour; set aside.
5. Sift together remaining flour, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and salt.
6. Stir dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
7. Fold in candied fruit, chocolate chips, chopped pecans, slivered almonds, and currants.
8. Chill dough for 1 hour at room temperature.
9. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
10. Place a piece of cherry on top of each cookie.
11. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until lightly browned.
12. Cool cookies on wire rack before storing in covered containers for several days to soften and age.
